frontmatter.title: Badge
frontmatter.description: Badge component is a dynamic embellishment that imparts additional information to components, akin to an adjective enhancing a sentence. This versatile component introduces content or a discreet dot to the top-right corner, enriched by customizable tones, fill or outline alternatives. It displays a '+' after a predefined numeric limit threshold to maintain clarity. Notably, the Badge component can be configured to exhibit a dynamic blinking effect, elevating its visual impact for dynamic user experiences.
